name: Sopa De Tortillas
recipeIngredient: 3 Whole, dried, crushed chiles (Anaheim or other mild chile.)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized saucepan, sauté the onion and garlic in bacon drippings or lard until fragrant.
2. Add beef stock, cumin, and chili peppers to the pan. Stir to combine.
3. Bring the mixture to a simmer and let it cook for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the chili peppers are tender.
4. Ladle the soup into bowls or mugs.
5. Top each bowl with grated cheese.
6. Divide half of the tostadas evenly among the servings.
7. Under a broiler for about 5 minutes, until the cheese melts.
8. Sprinkle additional tostadas on top of the melted cheese.
9. Serve remaining tostadas in a separate bowl.
